header_sub: Assess your organisation's maturity in under 15 minutes. Get a personalised scoring report and priority actions.
apikey_note: Your key is not stored — it is used only for this single API call.
apikey_server_found: API key detected on the server — no input required.
apikey_error: Invalid or missing key. Expected format: sk-ant-...
welcome_alert: The right to salary information access is mandatory by 7 June 2026 for all EU organisations.
scope_countries_hint: Select all countries where your organisation employs staff
scope_err_country: Please select at least one country.
scope_err_headcount: Please enter a valid headcount for
loading_sub: Claude is analysing your 27 answers and computing your regulatory positioning by country.
api_error_msg: Error calling the Claude API. Check your key and reload the page.

dimensions.label: Governance & Pay Policy
questions: Does your organisation have a written pay policy formally approved by leadership?
Does this policy include objective criteria for setting and evolving salaries?
Is a named individual responsible for driving pay equity within your organisation?
Has the executive committee been formally briefed on EU Directive 2023/970 requirements?
Has your organisation conducted a regulatory impact assessment on pay transparency?
Is a dedicated budget allocated for pay transparency compliance for 2024–2026?

dimensions.label: Structures & Job Classification
questions: Does your organisation use a formal job classification system (levels, grades, bands)?
Are classification criteria documented and free from identified gender bias?
Do job titles accurately reflect the actual scope of responsibilities?
Have you mapped jobs of equal or comparable value across your organisation?
Are salary grids documented by level/grade with defined pay ranges?
Are salary ranges communicated to candidates at the recruitment stage?

dimensions.label: Data & Reporting
questions: Does your HRIS allow extraction of compensation data broken down by gender?
Do you already calculate a gender pay gap indicator?
Is this indicator calculated using the Directive's required methodology (median + mean)?
Is your compensation data reliable and current enough for external reporting?
Do you have a regular HR reporting process that includes pay equity indicators?

dimensions.label: Employee Rights & Internal Transparency
questions: Can employees access on request the criteria used to determine their pay?
Is there a formalised process for responding to salary information requests?
Are managers trained to explain pay decisions to their teams?
Does your organisation have a grievance mechanism for perceived pay discrimination?
Do published job postings include a salary range or starting pay?

dimensions.label: Remediation & Operational Maturity
questions: Have you identified unexplained pay gaps within your organisation?
Is a corrective action plan in place to close identified pay gaps?
Has your organisation already published external pay equity indicators?
Are joint audits with employee representatives planned or underway?
Does your organisation consider itself ready for a compliance review by {deadline}?
